title: calceolaria larecajensis
intro: Calceolaria larecajensis, also known as the Andean slipper flower or Larecaja pocketbook flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calceolariaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Peruvian folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calceolaria larecajensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is typically used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
